# riya.automations.github.io
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Reanna Cabalfin — AI Automation &amp; Workflow Specialist</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Grotesk:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600&family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root{
    --paper: #FAF7EF;
    --paper-deep: #F0EADA;
    --navy-deep: #101E2C;
    --navy: #16283A;
    --ink: #182430;
    --ink-soft: #5C6B76;
    --line: #B9CBD4;
    --line-soft: rgba(46,111,142,0.16);
    --blue: #2E6F8E;
    --blue-dim: #7B96A3;
    --brass: #B9782A;
    --brass-bright: #D9973E;
    --text-on-navy: #EAF1F5;
    --text-on-navy-dim: #A9BFCB;
    --cyan: #7FD1EE;
    --radius: 3px;
    --maxw: 1180px;
  }

  *{box-sizing:border-box;}
  html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
  section[id], .section{scroll-margin-top:90px;}
  body{
    margin:0;
    background:var(--paper);
    color:var(--ink);
    font-family:'Inter', sans-serif;
    -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
    overflow-x:hidden;
  }
  ::selection{background:var(--brass); color:#fff;}

  h1,h2,h3{
    font-family:'Space Grotesk', sans-serif;
    margin:0;
    letter-spacing:-0.01em;
  }
  .mono{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
    letter-spacing:0.06em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
  }
  a{color:inherit;}
  img{max-width:100%; display:block;}

  .wrap{max-width:var(--maxw); margin:0 auto; padding:0 32px;}

  /* ---------- blueprint grid backdrop ---------- */
  .grid-bg{
    position:absolute; inset:-2px;
    background-image:
      linear-gradient(var(--line-soft) 1px, transparent 1px),
      linear-gradient(90deg, var(--line-soft) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size:44px 44px;
    mask-image:radial-gradient(ellipse 90% 70% at 50% 20%, black 40%, transparent 90%);
    pointer-events:none;
    animation:driftgrid 26s linear infinite;
  }
  @keyframes driftgrid{
    0%{background-position:0 0;}
    100%{background-position:44px 88px;}
  }

  /* ---------- side minimap nav ---------- */
  .minimap{
    position:fixed; right:26px; top:50%; transform:translateY(-50%);
    z-index:60; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:18px;
    align-items:flex-end;
  }
  .minimap a{
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; text-decoration:none;
    cursor:pointer;
  }
  .minimap .mm-label{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size:10px; letter-spacing:0.08em;
    text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--ink-soft);
    opacity:0; transform:translateX(6px);
    transition:opacity .25s ease, transform .25s ease;
    white-space:nowrap;
    background:var(--paper); padding:3px 8px; border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:3px;
  }
  .minimap a:hover .mm-label{opacity:1; transform:translateX(0);}
  .minimap .mm-dot{
    width:9px; height:9px; border-radius:50%;
    border:1.5px solid var(--blue-dim); background:var(--paper);
    transition:all .3s ease; flex-shrink:0;
  }
  .minimap a:hover .mm-dot{border-color:var(--blue); transform:scale(1.2);}
  .minimap a.active .mm-dot{
    background:var(--brass); border-color:var(--brass);
    box-shadow:0 0 0 4px rgba(185,120,42,0.18);
  }
  .minimap a.active .mm-label{color:var(--brass);}
  @media(max-width:900px){ .minimap{display:none;} }

  /* ---------- nav ---------- */
  header{
    position:fixed; top:0; left:0; right:0; z-index:50;
    background:rgba(250,247,239,0.86);
    backdrop-filter:blur(8px);
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);
  }
  nav{
    max-width:var(--maxw); margin:0 auto; padding:16px 32px;
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between;
  }
  .brand{
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px;
    font-family:'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-weight:600; font-size:15px;
    color:var(--ink);
  }
  .brand .node-dot{
    width:9px; height:9px; border-radius:50%;
    border:1.5px solid var(--blue); background:transparent;
  }
  .navlinks{display:flex; gap:28px; align-items:center;}
  .navlinks a{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size:12px;
    text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.08em;
    color:var(--ink-soft); text-decoration:none;
    transition:color .2s;
  }
  .navlinks a:hover{color:var(--blue);}
  .navlinks .btn{
    color:#fff; background:var(--brass);
    padding:8px 14px; border-radius:var(--radius);
    font-weight:600;
  }
  .navlinks .btn:hover{color:#fff; filter:brightness(1.08);}

  /* ---------- hero ---------- */
  .hero{
    position:relative;
    padding:170px 0 110px;
    overflow:hidden;
  }
  .hero .wrap{position:relative; z-index:2;}
  .eyebrow{
    font-size:12px; color:var(--blue); display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; margin-bottom:22px;
  }
  .eyebrow::before{
    content:""; width:26px; height:1px; background:var(--blue);
  }
  .hero h1{
    font-size:clamp(38px, 6vw, 72px);
    font-weight:700;
    line-height:1.05;
    color:var(--ink);
    max-width:880px;
  }
  .hero h1 span{color:var(--brass);}
  .hero .lede{
    margin-top:26px;
    max-width:600px;
    font-size:17px;
    line-height:1.65;
    color:var(--ink-soft);
  }
  .hero-ctas{margin-top:38px; display:flex; gap:14px; flex-wrap:wrap;}
  .btn{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
    font-size:12.5px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em;
    padding:13px 22px; border-radius:var(--radius);
    text-decoration:none; display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;
    border:1px solid transparent; transition:all .2s;
  }
  .btn-primary{background:var(--brass); color:#fff; font-weight:600;}
  .btn-primary:hover{filter:brightness(1.08); transform:translateY(-1px);}
  .btn-ghost{border-color:var(--blue-dim); color:var(--ink);}
  .btn-ghost:hover{border-color:var(--blue); color:var(--blue);}

  /* title block stamp */
  .stamp{
    position:relative; z-index:2;
    margin-top:64px;
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    max-width:640px;
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
    font-size:11.5px;
    background:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
  }
  .stamp-row{
    display:grid; grid-template-columns:130px 1fr;
    border-top:1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .stamp-row:first-child{border-top:none;}
  .stamp-row span:first-child{
    padding:9px 12px; color:var(--blue-dim); text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.08em;
    border-right:1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .stamp-row span:last-child{padding:9px 12px; color:var(--ink);}

  .hero-trace{
    position:absolute; right:-60px; top:110px; width:520px; height:520px;
    opacity:0.55; z-index:1; pointer-events:none;
  }
  .hero-trace path{
    fill:none; stroke:var(--blue); stroke-width:1.4;
    stroke-dasharray:900; stroke-dashoffset:900;
    animation:draw 2.6s ease forwards 0.3s;
  }
  .hero-trace circle{
    fill:var(--paper); stroke:var(--brass); stroke-width:1.4;
    opacity:0; animation:pop .4s ease forwards;
  }
  .hero-trace circle:nth-of-type(1){animation-delay:0.5s;}
  .hero-trace circle:nth-of-type(2){animation-delay:1.4s;}
  .hero-trace circle:nth-of-type(3){animation-delay:2.3s;}
  @keyframes draw{to{stroke-dashoffset:0;}}
  @keyframes pop{to{opacity:1;}}

  /* ---------- pipeline / connector system ---------- */
  .pipeline{position:relative;}
  .pipeline::before{
    content:"";
    position:absolute; left:32px; top:0; bottom:0; width:1px;
    background:repeating-linear-gradient(to bottom, var(--blue-dim) 0 6px, transparent 6px 12px);
    opacity:0.5;
  }
  @media(min-width:860px){
    .pipeline::before{left:50%; margin-left:-340px;}
  }

  .section{position:relative; padding:100px 0 30px;}
  .section-inner{padding-left:64px;}
  @media(min-width:860px){
    .section-inner{padding-left:0;}
  }

  .node-head{
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:14px; margin-bottom:46px;
    position:relative;
  }
  .node-circle{
    width:15px; height:15px; border-radius:50%;
    border:2px solid var(--blue-dim); background:var(--paper);
    position:absolute; left:-46px; top:2px;
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    transition:all .4s ease;
    flex-shrink:0;
  }
  @media(min-width:860px){
    .node-circle{left:50%; margin-left:-347px; top:0;}
  }
  .node-circle::after{
    content:""; width:5px; height:5px; border-radius:50%;
    background:var(--blue-dim); transition:all .4s ease;
  }
  .section.is-run .node-circle{
    border-color:var(--brass);
    animation:nodepulse 2.4s ease-in-out infinite;
  }
  @keyframes nodepulse{
    0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 4px rgba(185,120,42,0.15);}
    50%{box-shadow:0 0 0 8px rgba(185,120,42,0.05);}
  }
  .section.is-run .node-circle::after{
    background:var(--brass);
  }
  .node-label{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size:11px;
    letter-spacing:0.12em; text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--blue-dim); transition:color .4s ease;
  }
  .section.is-run .node-label{color:var(--brass);}
  .node-check{
    font-size:10px; color:var(--brass); opacity:0; transition:opacity .3s ease .2s;
  }
  .section.is-run .node-check{opacity:1;}

  .section h2{
    font-size:clamp(26px, 3.4vw, 36px);
    color:var(--ink); margin-bottom:6px;
  }
  .section-sub{
    color:var(--ink-soft); max-width:600px; font-size:15px; line-height:1.6; margin-bottom:44px;
  }

  /* ---------- about ---------- */
  .about-grid{
    display:grid; gap:40px;
    grid-template-columns:1.3fr 1fr;
  }
  @media(max-width:760px){ .about-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;} }
  .about-text p{
    font-size:16px; line-height:1.75; color:var(--ink);
    max-width:520px;
  }
  .about-text p + p{margin-top:16px;}
  .stat-list{display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:0; border:1px solid var(--line);}
  .stat{
    padding:18px 20px; border-top:1px solid var(--line);
    display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:baseline;
    transition:background .25s ease;
  }
  .stat:hover{background:rgba(46,111,142,0.05);}
  .stat:first-child{border-top:none;}
  .stat .num{font-family:'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size:26px; color:var(--brass); font-weight:600; transition:color .2s;}
  .stat:hover .num{color:var(--blue);}
  .stat .label{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size:11px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em; color:var(--ink-soft); text-align:right;}

  /* ---------- skills — moving ticker + parts list ---------- */
  .ticker{
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    background:var(--paper-deep);
    overflow:hidden;
    margin-bottom:22px;
    padding:14px 0;
    position:relative;
  }
  .ticker::before, .ticker::after{
    content:""; position:absolute; top:0; bottom:0; width:60px; z-index:2;
  }
  .ticker::before{left:0; background:linear-gradient(90deg, var(--paper-deep), transparent);}
  .ticker::after{right:0; background:linear-gradient(270deg, var(--paper-deep), transparent);}
  .ticker-track{
    display:flex; gap:14px; width:max-content;
    animation:scrollx 32s linear infinite;
  }
  .ticker:hover .ticker-track{animation-play-state:paused;}
  @keyframes scrollx{
    from{transform:translateX(0);}
    to{transform:translateX(-50%);}
  }
  .ticker .chip{white-space:nowrap;}

  .bom{
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    overflow-x:auto;
    background:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);
  }
  .bom table{width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; font-size:13.5px;}
  .bom th{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.08em;
    font-size:10.5px; color:var(--blue-dim); text-align:left;
    padding:12px 18px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .bom td{
    padding:14px 18px; border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);
    color:var(--ink); vertical-align:top;
  }
  .bom tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none;}
  .bom td:first-child{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; color:var(--brass); font-size:12px; white-space:nowrap;
  }
  .bom tr{
    transition:background .2s ease, transform .5s ease, opacity .5s ease;
    opacity:0; transform:translateX(-10px);
  }
  .bom tr.reveal{opacity:1; transform:translateX(0);}
  .bom tr:hover{background:rgba(46,111,142,0.06);}
  .chiprow{display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:8px;}
  .chip{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size:11.5px;
    padding:4px 10px; border:1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius:20px; color:var(--ink-soft);
    transition:all .2s ease; cursor:default;
    background:var(--paper);
  }
  .chip:hover{
    border-color:var(--brass); color:var(--brass); transform:translateY(-2px);
    background:rgba(185,120,42,0.08);
  }

  /* ---------- projects ---------- */
  .project{
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    margin-bottom:28px;
    display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr;
    background:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
    transition:border-color .3s ease, transform .3s ease, box-shadow .3s ease;
  }
  .project:hover{
    border-color:var(--brass);
    transform:translateY(-4px);
    box-shadow:0 24px 50px -34px rgba(16,30,44,0.35);
  }
  .project:hover .project-fig{color:var(--brass);}
  @media(min-width:760px){
    .project{grid-template-columns:1.1fr 1fr;}
    .project.reverse{grid-template-columns:1fr 1.1fr;}
    .project.reverse .project-media{order:2;}
  }
  .project-body{padding:34px 34px 30px;}
  .project-fig{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size:11px; color:var(--brass);
    letter-spacing:0.1em; margin-bottom:14px; transition:color .3s ease;
  }
  .project h3{font-size:21px; color:var(--ink); margin-bottom:12px;}
  .project p{font-size:14.5px; line-height:1.65; color:var(--ink-soft); margin:0 0 18px;}
  .project ul{margin:0 0 18px; padding-left:18px; color:var(--ink-soft); font-size:14px; line-height:1.6;}
  .project ul li{margin-bottom:6px;}
  .project-media{
    background:
      linear-gradient(rgba(127,209,238,0.08) 1px, transparent 1px),
      linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(127,209,238,0.08) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size:24px 24px;
    background-color:var(--navy-deep);
    padding:18px;
    display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:12px; justify-content:center;
  }
  .screen{
    border:1px solid rgba(127,209,238,0.3);
    border-radius:4px; overflow:hidden;
    box-shadow:0 18px 40px -18px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);
    transition:transform .4s ease;
  }
  .project:hover .screen{transform:scale(1.015);}
  .screen img{width:100%; display:block;}
  .screen-cap{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size:10px; color:var(--cyan);
    text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.08em; padding-top:2px;
  }

  /* ---------- experience ---------- */
  .timeline{display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:0;}
  .tl-item{
    padding:26px 0; border-top:1px solid var(--line);
    display:grid; grid-template-columns:170px 1fr; gap:24px;
  }
  .tl-item:first-child{border-top:none;}
  @media(max-width:640px){ .tl-item{grid-template-columns:1fr; gap:6px;} }
  .tl-date{font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size:12px; color:var(--blue-dim);}
  .tl-role{font-family:'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size:17px; color:var(--ink); margin-bottom:4px;}
  .tl-org{font-size:13.5px; color:var(--brass); margin-bottom:10px; font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;}
  .tl-item p{font-size:14.5px; color:var(--ink-soft); line-height:1.6; margin:0 0 6px;}

  .edu-box{
    border:1px solid var(--line); padding:24px 26px; margin-top:10px;
    background:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);
  }
  .edu-box h4{font-family:'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size:16px; color:var(--ink); margin:0 0 4px;}
  .edu-box p{margin:0; color:var(--ink-soft); font-size:13.5px; line-height:1.6;}
  .edu-box .mono{color:var(--blue-dim); font-size:11px; margin-top:8px; display:block;}

  /* ---------- contact (the one dark plate, with portrait) ---------- */
  .contact-section{padding-bottom:60px;}
  .contact-panel{
    border:1px solid var(--navy);
    padding:0;
    background:var(--navy-deep);
    color:var(--text-on-navy);
    overflow:hidden;
  }
  .contact-copy{
    padding:52px 44px;
    position:relative;
    background:radial-gradient(circle at 15% 20%, rgba(127,209,238,0.1), transparent 60%);
  }
  .contact-panel h2{font-size:clamp(28px,4vw,40px); color:#fff; max-width:480px;}
  .contact-panel p{color:var(--text-on-navy-dim); max-width:440px; margin-top:16px; line-height:1.65; font-size:15.5px;}
  .contact-links{display:flex; gap:14px; flex-wrap:wrap; margin-top:32px;}
  .contact-links .btn-ghost{border-color:rgba(127,209,238,0.4); color:var(--text-on-navy);}
  .contact-links .btn-ghost:hover{border-color:var(--cyan); color:var(--cyan);}
  .contact-meta{
    margin-top:40px; display:flex; gap:32px; flex-wrap:wrap;
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size:12px; color:var(--text-on-navy-dim);
  }
  .contact-meta strong{display:block; color:var(--cyan); font-size:10px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.08em; margin-bottom:6px;}


  footer{
    border-top:1px solid var(--line);
    padding:26px 0 40px;
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size:11px; color:var(--ink-soft);
    text-align:center;
  }

  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){
    html{scroll-behavior:auto;}
    .hero-trace path, .hero-trace circle{animation:none; stroke-dashoffset:0; opacity:1;}
    .node-circle, .node-label, .node-check{transition:none;}
    .grid-bg, .ticker-track, .contact-photo::after, .live-dot{animation:none;}
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<header>
  <nav>
    <div class="brand"><span class="node-dot"></span>REANNA CABALFIN</div>
    <div class="navlinks">
      <a href="#work">Work</a>
      <a href="#skills">Skills</a>
      <a href="#experience">Experience</a>
      <a href="mailto:reanna.cabalfin@gmail.com" class="btn">Hire Me</a>
    </div>
  </nav>
</header>

<section class="hero">
  <div class="grid-bg"></div>
  <svg class="hero-trace" viewBox="0 0 520 520" aria-hidden="true">
    <path d="M40,460 L40,300 Q40,270 70,270 L220,270 Q250,270 250,240 L250,120 Q250,90 280,90 L440,90"/>
    <circle cx="40" cy="460" r="6"/>
    <circle cx="220" cy="270" r="6"/>
    <circle cx="440" cy="90" r="6"/>
  </svg>
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="eyebrow mono">AI Automation &amp; Workflow Specialist</div>
    <h1>I build the pipelines that <span>reply, sort, and log</span> while you're doing something else.</h1>
    <p class="lede">Entry-level automation specialist based in the Philippines. I design n8n and GoHighLevel systems that read messages, qualify leads, scan receipts, and route the right work to the right person — so small teams stop doing by hand what a workflow can do in seconds.</p>
    <div class="hero-ctas">
      <a href="#work" class="btn btn-primary">See the builds ↓</a>
      <a href="mailto:reanna.cabalfin@gmail.com" class="btn btn-ghost">Say hello</a>
    </div>

    <div class="stamp">
      <div class="stamp-row"><span>Name</span><span>Reanna D. Cabalfin</span></div>
      <div class="stamp-row"><span>Location</span><span>General Santos City, Philippines</span></div>
      <div class="stamp-row"><span>Status</span><span>Open to freelance &amp; entry-level roles</span></div>
      <div class="stamp-row"><span>Background</span><span>BS Mechanical Engineering, 2025</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<nav class="minimap" aria-label="Section navigation">
  <a href="#about" data-target="about"><span class="mm-label mono">About</span><span class="mm-dot"></span></a>
  <a href="#skills" data-target="skills"><span class="mm-label mono">Skills</span><span class="mm-dot"></span></a>
  <a href="#work" data-target="work"><span class="mm-label mono">Work</span><span class="mm-dot"></span></a>
  <a href="#experience" data-target="experience"><span class="mm-label mono">Experience</span><span class="mm-dot"></span></a>
  <a href="#contact" data-target="contact"><span class="mm-label mono">Contact</span><span class="mm-dot"></span></a>
</nav>

<div class="pipeline">

  <section class="section" id="about">
    <div class="wrap section-inner">
      <div class="node-head">
        <div class="node-circle"><span class="node-check">✓</span></div>
        <span class="node-label mono">Trigger — Visitor Lands</span>
      </div>
      <h2>Why an engineer builds automations</h2>
      <div class="about-grid">
        <div class="about-text">
          <p>I trained as a mechanical engineer, which means I was taught to read a system before touching it — inputs, tolerances, failure points — then document exactly how it behaves. Automation turned out to need the same instincts, just applied to messages, leads, and spreadsheets instead of pumps.</p>
          <p>I now build with n8n and GoHighLevel, layering in Google Gemini where a workflow needs judgment rather than just rules. Every build below is live or was live in a real business, not a demo I made to look busy.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="stat-list">
          <div class="stat"><span class="num">5</span><span class="label">Production workflows shipped</span></div>
          <div class="stat"><span class="num">2</span><span class="label">Platforms — n8n &amp; GoHighLevel</span></div>
          <div class="stat"><span class="num">1</span><span class="label">Family business run on my automations</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="section" id="skills">
    <div class="wrap section-inner">
      <div class="node-head">
        <div class="node-circle"><span class="node-check">✓</span></div>
        <span class="node-label mono">Action — Explore Skills</span>
      </div>
      <h2>Tools I build with</h2>
      <p class="section-sub">Moving down the line, left to right — hover to pause. Grouped below by what each tool is responsible for.</p>

      <div class="ticker">
        <div class="ticker-track" id="skillTicker"></div>
      </div>

      <div class="bom">
        <table>
          <thead>
            <tr><th>Category</th><th>Components</th></tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody id="bomBody">
            <tr>
              <td>Automation &amp; CRM</td>
              <td class="chiprow"><span class="chip">n8n</span><span class="chip">GoHighLevel</span><span class="chip">Apollo.io</span><span class="chip">HubSpot</span><span class="chip">Airtable</span></td>
            </tr>
            <tr>
              <td>AI Models</td>
              <td class="chiprow"><span class="chip">Google Gemini Pro</span><span class="chip">Claude</span><span class="chip">ChatGPT</span><span class="chip">DeepSeek</span></td>
            </tr>
            <tr>
              <td>Productivity</td>
              <td class="chiprow"><span class="chip">Google Workspace</span><span class="chip">Microsoft 365</span></td>
            </tr>
            <tr>
              <td>Communication</td>
              <td class="chiprow"><span class="chip">Telegram</span><span class="chip">Slack</span><span class="chip">Discord</span><span class="chip">Zoom</span><span class="chip">Google Meet</span></td>
            </tr>
            <tr>
              <td>Project Mgmt</td>
              <td class="chiprow"><span class="chip">Notion</span><span class="chip">Trello</span><span class="chip">Asana</span><span class="chip">ClickUp</span></td>
            </tr>
            <tr>
              <td>Design &amp; Social</td>
              <td class="chiprow"><span class="chip">Canva</span><span class="chip">CapCut</span><span class="chip">Meta Business Suite</span></td>
            </tr>
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="section" id="work">
    <div class="wrap section-inner">
      <div class="node-head">
        <div class="node-circle"><span class="node-check">✓</span></div>
        <span class="node-label mono">Action — View Builds</span>
      </div>
      <h2>Featured builds</h2>
      <p class="section-sub">Five automations built end-to-end, from trigger to output. Screenshots are pulled straight from the working canvases.</p>

      <div class="project">
        <div class="project-body">
          <div class="project-fig">FIG. 01 — PERSONAL FINANCE</div>
          <h3>AI Budget Tracker &amp; Receipt Scanner</h3>
          <p>A multi-agent finance system built from scratch. A Telegram photo of a receipt goes in; a validated, categorized transaction comes out the other end — checked against the month's budget automatically.</p>
          <ul>
            <li>Gemini reads each receipt photo and extracts merchant, total, category, and payment method</li>
            <li>Flags duplicate or blurry scans before they reach the sheet</li>
            <li>Conversational agent answers free-text spending questions straight from live Sheets data</li>
          </ul>
          <div class="chiprow"><span class="chip">n8n</span><span class="chip">Gemini</span><span class="chip">Google Sheets</span><span class="chip">Telegram</span></div>
        </div>
        <div class="project-media">
          <div class="screen"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Budget tracker n8n workflow with receipt scanning, validation, and budget-checking nodes"></div>
          <div class="screen-cap mono">n8n — full pipeline, 8 linked sections</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="project reverse">
        <div class="project-body">
          <div class="project-fig">FIG. 02 — INVENTORY</div>
          <h3>Receipt &amp; Inventory Scanner</h3>
          <p>A sister build focused on stock instead of spend. Every receipt photo is broken down line-item by line-item, and each item updates a live inventory sheet — no manual counting.</p>
          <ul>
            <li>Telegram-triggered AI agent extracts every line item from a receipt photo</li>
            <li>Loops through items with custom JavaScript to match and update inventory rows</li>
            <li>Replaces manual stock entry entirely for the business it runs on</li>
          </ul>
          <div class="chiprow"><span class="chip">n8n</span><span class="chip">Gemini</span><span class="chip">JavaScript</span><span class="chip">Telegram</span></div>
        </div>
        <div class="project-media">
          <div class="screen"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Receipt scanner n8n workflow reading line items and updating an inventory sheet"></div>
          <div class="screen-cap mono">n8n — receipt-to-inventory loop</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="project">
        <div class="project-body">
          <div class="project-fig">FIG. 03 — LEAD ROUTING</div>
          <h3>Lead Categorization with Internal Notifications</h3>
          <p>A Gmail-triggered workflow that reads incoming leads the moment they land, decides what kind of lead they are, and gets a notification to the right person before the inbox even refreshes.</p>
          <ul>
            <li>Gemini agent with structured output parsing categorizes each incoming email</li>
            <li>Logs every lead to Google Sheets automatically</li>
            <li>Rules-based Switch routes real-time alerts to the correct team member</li>
          </ul>
          <div class="chiprow"><span class="chip">n8n</span><span class="chip">Gmail</span><span class="chip">Gemini</span><span class="chip">Google Sheets</span></div>
        </div>
        <div class="project-media">
          <div class="screen"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Lead categorization n8n workflow with Gmail trigger, AI agent, and switch routing"></div>
          <div class="screen-cap mono">n8n — Gmail to routed notification</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="project reverse">
        <div class="project-body">
          <div class="project-fig">FIG. 04 — CONVERSATIONAL AI</div>
          <h3>AI-Powered Facebook Messenger Agent</h3>
          <p>Two systems talking to each other: a GoHighLevel Messenger workflow hands each new message off to an n8n AI agent, which replies with full conversation memory — no one on the team touches it.</p>
          <ul>
            <li>GoHighLevel captures the Messenger conversation and calls out over webhook</li>
            <li>n8n AI agent (Gemini + memory) generates a context-aware reply</li>
            <li>Response is sent straight back into the same Messenger thread</li>
          </ul>
          <div class="chiprow"><span class="chip">n8n</span><span class="chip">GoHighLevel</span><span class="chip">Gemini</span><span class="chip">Webhook</span></div>
        </div>
        <div class="project-media">
          <div class="screen"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="n8n side of the Facebook Messenger AI agent workflow"></div>
          <div class="screen-cap mono">n8n — webhook in, AI agent, respond</div>
          <div class="screen"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="GoHighLevel side of the Facebook Messenger AI agent workflow"></div>
          <div class="screen-cap mono">GoHighLevel — Messenger trigger &amp; handoff</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="project">
        <div class="project-body">
          <div class="project-fig">FIG. 05 — ENGAGEMENT</div>
          <h3>Facebook Comment-to-DM Automation</h3>
          <p>Turns public comments into private conversations. Built and still running for my family's bakeshop, where it now handles the first response to every post comment.</p>
          <ul>
            <li>Auto-replies to comments on qualifying posts</li>
            <li>Opens an interactive Messenger conversation to capture and qualify the lead</li>
            <li>Live in production, driving real engagement for a small business</li>
          </ul>
          <div class="chiprow"><span class="chip">GoHighLevel</span><span class="chip">Facebook</span><span class="chip">Messenger</span></div>
        </div>
        <div class="project-media">
          <div class="screen"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="GoHighLevel comment-on-post automation workflow"></div>
          <div class="screen-cap mono">GoHighLevel — comment trigger to DM</div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="section" id="experience">
    <div class="wrap section-inner">
      <div class="node-head">
        <div class="node-circle"><span class="node-check">✓</span></div>
        <span class="node-label mono">Action — Check Background</span>
      </div>
      <h2>Experience</h2>
      <div class="timeline">
        <div class="tl-item">
          <div class="tl-date mono">2019 — Present</div>
          <div>
            <div class="tl-role">Sales Clerk &amp; Digital Automation Lead</div>
            <div class="tl-org">Bebot &amp; Matet Bakeshop · Family-owned business</div>
            <p>Designed and deployed the GoHighLevel comment-to-Messenger automation above, growing the shop's digital engagement. Also manage daily sales transactions and track inventory in Excel.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="tl-item">
          <div class="tl-date mono">Jun — Aug 2024</div>
          <div>
            <div class="tl-role">Mechanical Engineering Intern</div>
            <div class="tl-org">Philbest Canning Corporation</div>
            <p>Developed a 3D pumping system schematic in Autodesk Inventor and documented equipment inspection findings into reports used for proactive maintenance — the same spec-driven habits I now bring to workflow design.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="edu-box">
        <h4>Bachelor of Science in Mechanical Engineering</h4>
        <p>Mindanao State University — General Santos City, Philippines · 2025</p>
        <span class="mono">Coursework: Computer Applications · Digital Tools &amp; Productivity Systems · Technical Communication · Research Methods &amp; Technical Writing</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="section contact-section" id="contact">
    <div class="wrap section-inner">
      <div class="node-head">
        <div class="node-circle"><span class="node-check">✓</span></div>
        <span class="node-label mono">Output — Get In Touch</span>
      </div>
      <div class="contact-panel">
        <div class="contact-copy">
          <h2>Have a process worth automating?</h2>
          <p>If it involves messages, leads, receipts, or spreadsheets that someone is still handling by hand, I'd like to hear about it.</p>
          <div class="contact-links">
            <a href="mailto:reanna.cabalfin@gmail.com" class="btn btn-primary">reanna.cabalfin@gmail.com</a>
            <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/reanna-cabalfin-058586347" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="btn btn-ghost">LinkedIn ↗</a>
          </div>
          <div class="contact-meta">
            <div><strong>Phone</strong>+63 966 739 3458</div>
            <div><strong>Based in</strong>General Santos City, PH</div>
            <div><strong>Availability</strong>Freelance &amp; entry-level roles</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

</div>

<footer>
  Reanna D. Cabalfin — AI Automation &amp; Workflow Specialist. Built with the same tools she automates with.
</footer>

<script>
  // build the moving skills ticker (duplicated once for a seamless loop)
  const tools = ["n8n","GoHighLevel","Apollo.io","HubSpot","Airtable","Google Gemini Pro","Claude","ChatGPT","DeepSeek","Google Workspace","Microsoft 365","Telegram","Slack","Discord","Zoom","Google Meet","Notion","Trello","Asana","ClickUp","Canva","CapCut","Meta Business Suite"];
  const track = document.getElementById('skillTicker');
  const build = () => tools.map(t => `<span class="chip">${t}</span>`).join('');
  track.innerHTML = build() + build();

  const sections = document.querySelectorAll('.section');
  const mmLinks = document.querySelectorAll('.minimap a');

  const io = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(e => {
      if(e.isIntersecting){
        e.target.classList.add('is-run');
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.3, rootMargin: '0px 0px -10% 0px' });
  sections.forEach(s => io.observe(s));

  const activeIO = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(e => {
      const id = e.target.getAttribute('id');
      const link = document.querySelector('.minimap a[data-target="' + id + '"]');
      if(!link) return;
      if(e.isIntersecting){
        mmLinks.forEach(l => l.classList.remove('active'));
        link.classList.add('active');
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0, rootMargin: '-45% 0px -45% 0px' });
  sections.forEach(s => activeIO.observe(s));

  // staggered reveal for the parts-list table rows
  const rows = document.querySelectorAll('#bomBody tr');
  const rowIO = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach((e, i) => {
      if(e.isIntersecting){
        const idx = Array.from(rows).indexOf(e.target);
        e.target.style.transitionDelay = (idx * 70) + 'ms';
        e.target.classList.add('reveal');
        rowIO.unobserve(e.target);
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.2 });
  rows.forEach(r => rowIO.observe(r));
</script>

</body>
</html>
